title: Implement Ollama structured tasks behind explicit live-mode opt-in
problem: Live structured inference is impossible today: four pipeline modules hard-force RGE_LLM_MODE=mock before every model call, and OllamaModelClient structured tasks raise OllamaNotAvailableInPhase0. The core product rule (Qwen/Ollama proposes candidate JSON; Python validates and writes) has never run live. Phase 2 needs a real local model path behind an explicit opt-in gate without weakening golden tests or safety boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM opt-in is implemented in config with fail-closed parsing; documented in 12_RUNTIME_CONFIG.md, .env.example, and .env.smoke.example.
A shared effective-mode resolver returns mock unless RGE_LLM_MODE=ollama and RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM=1; four pipeline modules use it instead of hard-forced mock env hacks.
execute_fixture_mode_run and golden tests remain mock-only regardless of operator .env settings.
OllamaModelClient implements structured tasks for extract_claims, link_concepts, draft_relationships, and detect_contradictions via prompt + JSON parse + schema_version check + Pydantic validation.

Without RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM=1, pipeline behavior is identical to today (mock/fixture path); with opt-in set but Ollama unreachable, structured calls fail with a clear error and do not silently fall back to mock.

With RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM=1 and a running Ollama instance, research extract-claims produces validated accepted/rejected claims through the existing Python validation path (manual smoke documented in agent report).
No model client writes directly to accepted graph tables; extractor metadata records actual provider/model from the client.
Canned unit tests (mocked HTTP, no Ollama) cover prompt construction, valid JSON parse, schema_version mismatch, malformed JSON, and invalid batch rejection.
Golden tests pass unchanged with RGE_LLM_MODE=mock and no Ollama running.
Full pytest and python -m rge.modules.safety_auditor --audit full pass.
No cloud provider adapters or API keys are added.
non_goals: Do not add OpenAI, OpenRouter, Anthropic, Gemini, or Vertex adapters.
Do not change public export schema or public-site behavior.
Do not add LangGraph nodes or live discovery (research run without --fixture-mode).
Do not add live_smoke pytest marker, model-health CLI, or CI workflow (ticket-038).
Do not remove mock forcing from execute_fixture_mode_run.
Do not add default live tests to pytest collection.
Do not implement ticket-038 or later.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket-037 branch; golden tests and fixture runs remain mock-only.
